description: Initial execution result for task task0

data.task_objective: Implement a module to parse and analyze job descriptions and candidate resumes, producing structured feature data and match indicators.
data.context: No completed previous tasks context available.
data.next_objective:
Task task1:
  Objective: Create a question generator that produces technical and behavioral interview questions based on the parsed job and resume data.
Task task2:
  Objective: Build an interview engine to conduct the interview session, present generated questions, capture candidate responses, and dynamically trigger follow-up questions.
Task task5:
  Objective: Build a recruiter communication generator to produce interview invitations and follow-up emails using templates and candidate/job data.
Task task6:
  Objective: Assemble the final candidate evaluation report in plain text, combining resume-job match analysis, interview summary, technical and behavioral assessments, strengths/weaknesses, recommendation, and scoring breakdown.
